review_blocker_summary: Ada requested strict loopback host validation instead of accepting any 127.* hostname; resolved with strict IPv4 loopback parsing and regression coverage
Ada and Turing requested server-layer unsafe bind/config rejection; resolved with exported server config validation before Jazzy.serve
Ada requested case-insensitive JSON media type validation including application/*+json; resolved with normalized media-type checks and coverage
Ada requested concrete high-entropy token generation guidance; resolved in README serve docs
Turing requested stronger payload-size handling than body length alone; resolved with Content-Length precheck plus actual body-length enforcement
